description: A dashboard for AdGuard DNS metrics.

spec.description: Blocked means AdGuard blocklist or blocked-service reasons.
spec.title: Blocked Percentage

spec.description: Skipped records indicate invalid JSON or records missing fields required by the exporter.
spec.title: Skipped Querylog Records

spec.description: Blocked means AdGuard blocklist or blocked-service reasons.
spec.title: Blocked Query Rate

spec.description: AdGuard filtering result reasons as parsed from querylog Result.Reason.
spec.title: Filtering Reasons

spec.description: This is querylog Elapsed grouped by upstream. AdGuard Home querylog records do not expose pure upstream round-trip duration, and cached queries are excluded.
spec.title: Query Processing Time By Upstream

spec.description: Skipped records should normally remain zero. Non-zero series point to invalid JSON or missing querylog fields.
spec.title: Skipped Querylog Records By Reason

spec.expr: topk(100, sum by (host) (agh_dns_query_hosts_total{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"}) and on (host) (agh_dns_query_hosts_created{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"} >= $metrics_start_time))

topk(100, sum by (host) (agh_blocked_dns_query_hosts_total{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"}) and on (host) (agh_blocked_dns_query_hosts_created{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"} >= $metrics_start_time))

topk(100, sum by (host) (agh_safe_search_enforced_hosts_total{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"}) and on (host) (agh_safe_search_enforced_hosts_created{job=~"$job", namespace=~"$namespace", instance=~"$instance"} >= $metrics_start_time))

title: AdGuard DNS Metrics
